items.question: When will you arrive?
items.answer: You'll get an estimated arrival window. We do our best to stay within it, though weather, traffic, or prior jobs can occasionally cause slight delays.

items.question: How often will you service my lawn?
items.answer: We offer weekly and bi-weekly service, and you can adjust, pause, or cancel anytime with a quick message.

items.question: What should I do before you arrive?
items.answer: Unlock gates, secure pets, and clear toys, hoses, and other obstacles from the lawn. Please also mark any sprinkler heads or hidden hazards.

items.question: What if my grass is really tall?
items.answer: Significantly overgrown lawns may need extra time, multiple passes, or a first-cut service instead of a standard mow — we'll always confirm pricing with you first.

items.question: Do I need to be home?
items.answer: Not at all — as long as gates are unlocked and pets are secured, we can service your property while you're away.

items.question: How do I pay?
items.answer: Payment is due on completion of service. We accept card, cash, and Cash App, with easy online payment options available.

items.question: What if I'm not happy with the service?
items.answer: Let us know within 24 hours and we'll make it right. We take pride in every property we service.
